title: RM-01B record RM-01
objective:
Run script:
"""
queue_path = Path('governance/roadmap/ACTIVE_QUEUE.json')
queue = json.loads(queue_path.read_text(encoding='utf-8'))
for task in queue.get('tasks', []):
    if task.get('id') == 'RM-01':
        task['status'] = 'DONE'
        task['sha'] = '0d801ea289ed0a6d580506d7772e598959a06fcb'
        task['completed_at'] = '2026-06-04T11:27:19Z'
    if task.get('id') == 'RM-02':
        task['status'] = 'PENDING'
queue['updated_at'] = '2026-06-04T11:32:00Z'
queue_path.write_text(json.dumps(queue, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2) + '\n', encoding='utf-8')
changed_files.append(str(queue_path))
log_path = Path('governance/logs/execution_log.jsonl')
log_path.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
existing = log_path.read_text(encoding='utf-8') if log_path.exists() else ''
line = json.dumps({'date':'2026-06-04T11:27:19Z','id':'RM-01','trace_id':'rm01_revoke_false_pass_bem1284_gate2','sha':'0d801ea289ed0a6d580506d7772e598959a06fcb','status':'done','workflow_files_touched':False}, ensure_ascii=False)
if line not in existing:
    existing += line + '\n'
log_path.write_text(existing, encoding='utf-8')
changed_files.append(str(log_path))
state = Path('governance/state/RM01B_RECORD_RM01_ACTIVATE_RM02.json')
state.write_text(json.dumps({'id':'RM-01B','trace_id':'rm01b_record_rm01_activate_rm02','status':'completed','release_pass':False,'recorded_step':'RM-01','recorded_sha':'0d801ea289ed0a6d580506d7772e598959a06fcb','activated':'RM-02','workflow_files_touched':False,'next':'RM-02 fail-closed truncated py'}, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2) + '\n', encoding='utf-8')
changed_files.append(str(state))
report = Path('governance/reports/RM01B_RECORD_RM01_ACTIVATE_RM02.md')
report.write_text('# RM-01B | Record RM-01 and activate RM-02\nStatus: completed\nDate: 2026-06-04\n\nRM-01 recorded as DONE with SHA 0d801ea289ed0a6d580506d7772e598959a06fcb. RM-02 set to PENDING in governance/roadmap/ACTIVE_QUEUE.json. Workflow lock respected.\n\nNext: RM-02 fail-closed truncated py.\n', encoding='utf-8')
changed_files.append(str(report))
